calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from Department 501 for Court Trial/Prove Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Plaintiff Nasir Patel appearing on his own behalf.
Plaintiff Nasir Patel sworn and examined.
No appearance by Defendant Kelly Ann Bedell.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court enters Judgment in favor of Plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
The Lease is canceled.
Restitution and Possession of the premises located at Brodway Hotel 2048 Polk Street, #320 San Francisco, CA 94109
Damages $5,666.50
Costs $240.00
for a Total Judgment of $5,906.50
Judgment signed in open court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-21-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-16-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay, Clerk M. Goodman, Not Reported, (501)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Nasir Patel in Pro Per DID NOT APPEAR.
Defendant Kelly Ann Bedell DID NOT APPEAR.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of Oct. 21, 2013 remains on calendar.
